task_goal: Send a text message using Simple SMS Messenger to +19378785700 with message: Weekend plans: Hiking trip to Blue Mountain.
task_goal_rewrite: A text message with the content 'Weekend plans: Hiking trip to Blue Mountain' is successfully sent to the phone number +19378785700 using Simple SMS Messenger.

checkpoints.description: The message recipient is set to the phone number +19378785700 in Simple SMS Messenger.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing +19378785700 as the active recipient in the compose screen or conversation thread in Simple SMS Messenger.

checkpoints.description: The message body contains the exact text: 'Weekend plans: Hiking trip to Blue Mountain'.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot displaying the full specified message text in the compose field or in the sent message entry in Simple SMS Messenger.

checkpoints.description: The message is marked as sent in Simple SMS Messenger's conversation thread with +19378785700.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the message with a visible 'sent' status (e.g., checkmark icon, timestamp indicating successful delivery) in the conversation thread for +19378785700.

success_rule: All three required checkpoints must be satisfied to confirm successful task completion.
